why_relevant: Bu-alpha owns the specialty pharmacy product area; field teams will need to prepare for the new submission flow before May 1.

recommended_actions.action: Assign training update to field operations lead

assumptions: Bu-alpha field teams currently use the specialty pharmacy order submission workflow.

message_variants.push_short: Specialty pharmacy order flow updated May 1. Training update needed.
message_variants.teams_medium: **Action needed by May 1:** The specialty pharmacy order submission workflow is adding a two-pass verification step. Your field teams will need updated training materials before the rollout.
message_variants.email_long:
Dear <display-name>,

Starting May 1, the specialty pharmacy order submission workflow will use a new two-pass verification step, replacing the previous single-pass validation.

What this means for your team: Field representatives submitting specialty pharmacy orders will encounter an additional verification screen. Training materials should be updated before rollout.

Recommended action: Assign your field operations lead to update training materials by April 28.

Questions? Reply to this message or contact the Change Intelligence team.

decisions.reason: Bu-alpha owns specialty pharmacy product area and field teams execute the order submission workflow that is changing.
Message names specific BU consequence (field rep training), concrete action identified with owner and deadline.
